pi_items.source: setup_task.sh file path and task instructions
task description instructions and export_result.sh script path checking
Code execution of netconvert yielded a 2.7MB output file, satisfying the 50KB minimum threshold

privileged_info_summary: I verified that the task uses real OpenStreetMap data downloaded directly from the Overpass API for Central Bologna. I successfully verified that the expected input path ('/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/osm_import/bologna_center.osm'), output path ('/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/osm_import/bologna_center.net.xml'), map projection ('utm'), and minimum file size threshold (50KB) explicitly match the task description instructions, setup scripts, and output generated by manually executing netconvert. Additionally, I discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable as the success spec references a missing script.
